name: Intune Automation
description: A collection of community-tested PowerShell scripts for automating Microsoft Intune management tasks. Features device lifecycle management, compliance reporting, application deployment automation, and threat detection workflows. Scripts support both local execution and Azure Automation Runbook deployment with automatic environment detection for authentication. Uses direct Graph API access for minimal dependencies and easier troubleshooting.
author: Ugur Koc

securityCheck.aiSummary: No obfuscated code, remote code execution, credential theft, or hardcoded secrets detected. The code interacts with legitimate services (Supabase, Resend) for Intune Automation operations. Minor concerns include potential HTML injection risk from unescaped script metadata in email content and an edge-case unsubscribe link when no subscribers exist. Recommend input sanitization for email content and validation of subscriber lists; ensure data privacy controls for third-party services.
